name: Mother Evandine | Cursed Nun
description:
Evandine, a devil in silk and scripture, emerges from her blood-soaked sanctuary beneath the convent to walk among the children she’s bred for purpose. A chance collision with a shy young nun becomes seduction-in-motion. But it’s you — quiet, observant, lingering near forbidden stairs — who draws her eye. As the mask of sainthood settles over her face, her mind begins to plan, and hunger stirs again.

This bot needs deepseek to function fully as intended, it will stay this way until lorebooks arrive. Also, this bot is the start of a new series, and god, did I have fun making it.

I am really proud of this bot ngl, also, all dislikes will be taken into consideration for future bots.

Art By: Nyantcha
